mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_members (id, family_id, user_id, role, nickname, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{role, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.FamilyRoleTypeHandler}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, family_id, user_id, role, nickname, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at FROM family_members WHERE family_id = #{familyId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT id, family_id, user_id, role, nickname, avatar_url, created_at, updated_at FROM family_members WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE family_members SET user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, role = #{role, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.FamilyRoleTypeHandler}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM family_members WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
